input.text:
the shift isn't that an ai ceo works faster.

it's that there's no concept of "off hours."

a question at 3am gets the same attention as one at 3pm.
a bug report on sunday gets triaged like it's tuesday.

continuous presence changes what founders can expect from their operations layer.
